data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of equal opportunity in the waitlist process. However, the evidence does not confirm that all users have equal chances to claim a spot without priority tiers. The linked use case describes a scenario where the first tap wins, but it does not provide evidence that all waitlisters are treated equally without any priority, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming that all waitlisters have equal opportunity without priority tiers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the equal opportunity requirement.
